summary: UAT Round 2 Fixes Testing Complete - All 7 features verified working. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All UI changes verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/categories/l2 - L2 categories fetch for each L1
Backend: POST /api/orders - Create ticket with generic category (GenericRequestForm)
Backend: GET /api/orders/my-requests - Created ticket appears in My Submitted Tickets
Backend: POST /api/orders/{id}/force-pool-2 - Force to Pool 2 endpoint works
Backend: Force to Pool 2 requires Administrator role
Backend: Force to Pool 2 only works on Open/unassigned tickets
Backend: GET /api/orders/my-assigned - My assigned tickets endpoint
Backend: GET /api/orders/pool - Pool shows unassigned Open tickets only
Backend: Ticket creation with all priorities (Low, Normal, High, Urgent)
Backend: Draft ticket creation and submission
Backend: Create issue via orders endpoint
Frontend: Dashboard has NO +NEW REQUEST button (removed)
Frontend: My Tickets page header shows 'My Submitted Tickets'
Frontend: Submit button appears for ALL L2 category selections (GenericRequestForm)
Frontend: Report an Issue page works with Bug Reports / Incidents category
Frontend: Force to Pool 2 button visible on OrderDetail for Admin on Open/unassigned tickets
critical_code_review_comments: GenericRequestForm correctly added to CommandCenter.js - shows when selectedL2 is set but no special form applies
Force to Pool 2 endpoint properly validates: requires Administrator role, only Open status, only unassigned tickets
My Submitted Tickets rename correctly implemented in MyRequests.js
seed_data_creation: Test tickets created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: UAT Round 2 fixes all verified working: 1) GenericRequestForm ensures Submit button shows for ALL categories, 2) Report an Issue works via /command-center?type=issue, 3) Force to Pool 2 endpoint at /api/orders/{id}/force-pool-2, 4) My Tickets renamed to 'My Submitted Tickets', 5) Dashboard +NEW REQUEST button removed, 6) Pool visibility shows unassigned only, 7) my-assigned endpoint for resolvers.

ticket_creation_generic_form.description: GenericRequestForm shows Submit button for ALL L2 category selections that don't have special forms

report_an_issue.description: Report an Issue navigates to /command-center?type=issue and shows Bug Report form

force_to_pool_2.description: Admin can force Open/unassigned tickets to Pool 2, bypassing 24h right-of-first-refusal

my_submitted_tickets_rename.description: My Tickets page header shows 'My Submitted Tickets'

pool_visibility.description: Pool endpoint shows only unassigned Open tickets

my_assigned_endpoint.description: Resolvers can see their assigned tickets

mocked_apis_list: Email (SMTP not configured with valid credentials)
